hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[CHEGGIE POLICY] Code exploration must use jCodeMunch MCP tools. See CLAUDE.md for the exploration policy." >&2; exit 1'

SessionStart.command: if which uvx >/dev/null 2>&1; then uvx jcodemunch-mcp init --repo . --yes 2>&1 && echo '[SUCCESS] jcodemunch init completed' || echo '[ERROR] jcodemunch init failed'; else echo '[INFO] jcodemunch init skipped (uvx not available)'; fi
